name: primary_payment_gateway
notes: Running normally, processes all online payments

name: backup_payment_gateway
notes: Backup channel, auto-switches when primary gateway fails

name: reconciliation_system
notes: Sync failing since March 20th, last successful sync was March 20th. Error: API connection timeout, reconciliation data has not been synced for 6 days.

name: invoice_system
notes: Status abnormal: API version incompatibility. Vendor upgraded API to v3 on March 18th, our system is still calling v2 interface, causing all invoice requests to return 400 errors. SDK upgrade required.
